s: A simple timer which pauses when not in view
d: Pomodorot is a timer that can be used for 20-minute breaks during the workday, or as a timer for the Pomodoro Technique. If you need a timer that pauses the countdown without requiring interaction with the app, this app might be for you. Features * Variable time intervals. * Minimalistic interface. * Easy on the eyes. * Open source. * Completely ad-free. Currently, the lock screen feature is only available on desktop, but a corresponding setting for Android is planned (mostly after godot adds an easy way to allow the app to run in the background). For more information, visit itch.io: https://ragebreaker.itch.io/pomodorot.
